title: poa californica
intro: Poa californica, also known as California bluegrass, is a perennial grass species native to the western United States. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Poa californica include soothing digestive issues, reducing fever, and treating respiratory problems. Poa californica can be prepared into teas, infusions, and tinctures for various herbal remedies, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
